evidence_boundary.fx_dag: process groups are reconstructed from the fixed-input FX DAG and node metadata
evidence_boundary.process_labels: labels are reconstruction rules, not official FX or vLLM module ownership
evidence_boundary.runtime_sampling: selected decoder-layer inputs were cloned during real vLLM eager inference

processes.rule: Fixed sampled layer inputs and control tensors exposed as FX placeholders.
processes.title: Runtime FX inputs

processes.rule: Combine hidden_states with residual, then run RMSNorm over the Hidden axis.
processes.title: Pre-attention residual add and input RMSNorm

processes.rule: Project normalized hidden states, split fused projection into Q/gate/K/V branches, and reshape Q heads.
processes.title: Fused Q/gate/K/V projection and head reshape

processes.rule: Normalize Q head vectors over head_dim before rotary embedding.
processes.title: Q head RMSNorm

processes.rule: Normalize K head vectors over head_dim before rotary embedding.
processes.title: K head RMSNorm

processes.rule: Index rotary tables with sampled positions, split cos/sin halves, and remap MROPE axis slices.
processes.title: MROPE cos/sin table lookup and axis remap

processes.rule: Apply rotary transform to the normalized Q branch and restore flattened Q layout.
processes.title: Q RoPE application

processes.rule: Apply rotary transform to the normalized K branch and restore flattened K layout.
processes.title: K RoPE application

nodes.args: (view_9, view_11, view_12, view_10, 'language_model.model.layers.31.self_attn.attn', None, None, unified_kv_cache_update)
nodes.name: unified_attention_with_output

processes.rule: View Q/K/V/output buffers by head, update KV cache, then call vLLM attention output custom op.
processes.title: vLLM attention and KV cache update

processes.rule: Flatten attention output, gate it with the fused Q-side branch, project to Hidden width, and add the pre-attention residual.
processes.title: Attention gate, output projection, and residual

processes.rule: Normalize the post-attention residual over the Hidden axis before the MLP projection.
processes.title: Post-attention RMSNorm

processes.rule: Run fused gate/up projection, SiLU-and-multiply activation, down projection, and package layer outputs.
processes.title: MLP and layer output tuple

specialization.note: FX replay runs after the eager layer output is produced, while vLLM forward context is still active.
